description:
A delicious GUI for Chocolatey

Chocolatey GUI is a delicious GUI on top of the Chocolatey command line tool.
Bug Fixes
- Digital Signature missing from artifacts of the 3.0.0 release.
  - See #1120 by gep13, resolved in !1121 by gep13.
- Application crashes when viewing the package details page.
  - See #1122 by gep13, resolved in !1123 by gep13.
Enhancement
- Mitigate against AutoMapper security advisory.
  - See #1112 by gep13, resolved in !1113 by gep13.
Contributors
1 contributors made this release possible.
